01 · About

Marketing professional who builds things.

I work across digital marketing, web development, and custom tooling for a group of recruitment agencies in Atlantic Canada. My day-to-day sits somewhere between strategy and execution, writing copy, building job boards, wiring APIs, and shipping dashboards that replace manual processes.

Currently working toward full stack freelance.

What I work with
  • HTML, CSS, JavaScript
  • React, Supabase
  • Python (scripting)
  • Node.js, automation
  • Google Apps Script
  • Chart.js, GA4
  • Squarespace (custom code)
  • API integrations
02 · Services

What I offer.

The Core Service

Website
Development.

A good website is still one of the highest-leverage investments a small business can make.

I build websites from scratch for businesses that have outgrown templates. Every project is designed around how your customers actually find and evaluate you, not what a theme can do out of the box.

Start a project
What's Included
i.
Full site design and build From brief to launch, start to finish.
ii.
Custom components and integrations Forms, APIs, job boards, interactive elements.
iii.
Mobile-first and built to convert Fast, accessible, designed for any device.
iv.
Ongoing maintenance available Monthly retainer once the site is live.
Brand

Brand Design

Logo, colour palette, and visual guidelines so your business looks consistent across every touchpoint, not just the website.

Social

Social Media Management

Content planning, copywriting, and scheduling across LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook. Available as a monthly retainer.

Tools

Custom Marketing Tools

Dashboards, automations, and small internal tools built for your specific workflow and team.

03 · Work

Selected projects.

i.

Three recruitment websites.

Designed and built three separate branded websites for a group of Atlantic Canadian recruitment agencies. Each one runs on Squarespace with fully custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Live job boards pull from external APIs, and the sites share a visual system while keeping each brand distinct.

integratedstaffing.ca accountantstaffing.ca administrativestaffing.ca
Outcome
+15%
Organic traffic uplift across all three brands, first 6 months
ii.

ClientWatch.

An internal job intelligence platform that monitors job boards across Atlantic Canada and alerts recruiters when an existing client posts a new role. It catches hiring activity that most CRMs miss. Built in Node and hosted on Railway.

Scale
1,684
Clients monitored continuously across three agencies
iii.

Live marketing performance dashboard.

A real-time KPI dashboard for Integrated Staffing that pulls live data from Google Sheets through a custom Apps Script endpoint. It tracks social media performance, website analytics, and quarter-over-quarter trends in one view, and replaced what used to be a manual monthly reporting process.

Analytics GA4 Chart.js Apps Script
Replaced
~6 hrs
Of manual reporting work per month
